description:
Material: Wood

PRODUCT INCLUDES:
• 1 Wooden Book Tracker Sign
• 3 Number Packs (digits 0–9) for customizable reading progress
• 1 Wooden Base for stable tabletop display
• 1 Giftable Box – perfect for gifting

📏 MATERIAL & SIZE:
• Available Heights: 7", 8", 9", or 10"
• Material: Premium multi-layer wood creating a dimensional 3D look
• Layer Thickness: 5 mm backboard for strong support, 3 mm detailed bookshelf layer, 2 mm interchangeable number plates, 5 mm wooden base for sturdy standing
• Crafted for durability with an elegant, handcrafted finish.

✨ PERSONALIZATION:
Customize the bottom panel with your name or custom text (e.g. "Sarah's Library") to create a one-of-a-kind reading nook or home library decor.
Includes interchangeable wooden numbers, allowing you to easily update your book count as you read throughout the year.
